name: yuval-claude-marketplace
description: Yuval Personal marketplace of plugins, skills, and commands for working with Claude across Cowork and Claude Code.

plugins.name: yuval-core
plugins.description: v0.8.0 — Yuval Core workspace plugin: ideation scaffolding (init, refresh-persona), code-workspace extension (init-code, write-brief, promote-to-code, report-back), Karpathy-style wiki discipline with proactive bookkeeping triggers and live session pages, session continuity, persona management, framework-canonical memory protocol shared by ideation and code wikis.
